occurrence_sentence: D-Wave Quantum announced it has calibrated a 1,200+ qubit Advantage2 prototype.

PRESS RELEASE — [D-Wave Quantum Inc.](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dwavesys.com%2F&esheet=52815740&lan=en-US&anchor=D-Wave+Quantum+Inc.&index=1&md5=0ed01d1bab586720bd5e928db7428557) (NYSE: QBTS) ("D-Wave"), a leader in quantum computing systems, software, and services and the world's first commercial supplier of quantum computers, today announced it has calibrated a 1,200+ qubit Advantage2 prototype, which will soon be available in the company's Leap real-time quantum cloud service.

PRESS RELEASE — [D-Wave Quantum Inc.](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dwavesys.com%2F&esheet=52815740&lan=en-US&anchor=D-Wave+Quantum+Inc.&index=1&md5=0ed01d1bab586720bd5e928db7428557) (NYSE: QBTS) ("D-Wave"), a leader in quantum computing systems, software, and services and the world's first commercial supplier of quantum computers, today announced it has calibrated a 1,200+ qubit Advantage2 prototype, which will soon be available in the company's Leap real-time quantum cloud service.

interaction_phrase: senior vice president of quantum technologies and systems products at D-Wave
occurrence_sentence: "The new Advantage2 prototype represents a giant step up in performance," said Mark W. Johnson, senior vice president of quantum technologies and systems products at D-Wave.

interaction_phrase: senior vice president of quantum technologies and systems products at D-Wave
occurrence_sentence: "The new Advantage2 prototype represents a giant step up in performance," said Mark W. Johnson, senior vice president of quantum technologies and systems products at D-Wave.

In November 2023, D-Wave [announced](https://www.dwavesys.com/company/newsroom/press-release/d-wave-demonstrates-error-mitigation-on-the-advantage2-prototype-extending-coherent-annealing-range-by-an-order-of-magnitude/) important research results that demonstrate successful Quantum Error Mitigation (QEM) in the Advantage2 prototype.

interaction_phrase: has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider
occurrence_sentence: Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for an R1 university for more than 12 years, specializing in translating high tech and deep tech for the general audience. He has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception.
